entities.name: options
entities.context: represents a union of settings for set() and get() functions

entities.name: set()
entities.context: a function used to modify settings

entities.name: get()
entities.context: a function used to retrieve settings

entities.name: cache.set()
entities.context: a method involved in caching settings

entities.name: fetchMethod
entities.context: refers to a method for fetching data
